/leonardo_work/EUHPC_D29_022/mchiesa0/benchmark/results_full_kimi-dev-72b_5000s_run1_batch7_20260321_155125/0085_1257_A/tmp/attempt.dfy(1,24): Error: invalid MethodDecl

1 | method TwoRivalStudents is supposed to compute the maximum distance between two students after a certain number of swaps.
